A brilliant afternoon in Claremont Gardens — sun, families, and four bears rehomed.

## Recap

The 2024 Surbiton Festival turned out to be one of the best of the year. The sun came out just as we were setting up and stayed all afternoon. Claremont Gardens was packed with families and the atmosphere was warm and relaxed — exactly the kind of event our bears love.

Four bears found new homes over the course of the afternoon, including one who had been with us since the previous summer. We also sold out of bookmarks and key fobs before 3pm, which has never happened at this event before.

The organisers were friendly, the pitch position was great, and we'll definitely be back in 2025.

A die-hard Arsenal fan who found his forever home at the Burnham Donkey Derby.
Aaron arrived wearing a full Arsenal kit and hasn't taken it off since. He knows every player's name.

Aaron came to us from a car boot sale in Southsea, still wearing his full Arsenal kit and clutching a tiny foam finger. His favourite players are Aubameyang and Saka — he'll correct you if you get the shirt numbers wrong.

After seven months at the stall he found his perfect match at the Burnham Donkey Derby in May 2019. His new owner, a lifelong Gooner, spotted him from three tables away and made a beeline straight for him.

We like to think they watched the next match together.

Traditionally known as a Drawstring bag. The Anything Bag is exactly that. Good for anything!

Three handmade fabric bookmarks — no two sets are ever quite the same.
Cotton quilting fabric, interfacing, coordinating ribbon

Each set of three bookmarks is cut and sewn by hand using coordinating quilting cottons, with a ribbon loop so they stay put in the page. Because fabrics change with each batch, no two sets are identical — you're getting something genuinely one-of-a-kind.

## How It's Made

The fabric is chosen in groups of three to make sure the prints complement each other. Each bookmark is interfaced for stiffness, top-stitched on all four sides, and finished with a folded ribbon loop at the top. The whole set is packaged together with a small card explaining the care instructions.
